title: Locale Catalog
description: JSON Schema for a single-locale translation catalog file under src/i18n/locales/<code>.json. The catalog is a flat object whose keys are dotted translation keys and whose values are translated strings.

^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*(\\.[a-z0-9_]+)*$.description: Translated string. May contain {tokenName} placeholders. Placeholders MUST match the same key in the default locale exactly.
